item.title: Open AI 发布 Sora 最新作品视频，看懂的可以评论下 | 零度解说
item.itunes:title: Open AI 发布 Sora 最新作品视频，看懂的可以评论下 | 零度解说
item.itunes:author: 零度解说
item.itunes:summary:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ykwH4g7m6U

【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1

【零度博客】▶https://www.freedidi.com

【加入会员】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w/join

-------------------------------------

item.description:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ykwH4g7m6U

item.content:encoded:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====

item.title: 快速提升上网速度！免费又好用，适用 Windows 10 /11，非常简单！！（2024） | 零度解说
item.itunes:title: 快速提升上网速度！免费又好用，适用 Windows 10 /11，非常简单！！（2024） | 零度解说
item.itunes:author: 零度解说
item.itunes:summary:
# 优化前的网络测速

# 设置网络控制

# 优选免费高速的DNS

# WiFi传输电源值设置

# 漫游主动性

# 首选网络频带

# 禁用 U-APSD 自动省电模式

# 更改保留宽带的占用

# 修改tcp吞吐量级别

# 游戏玩家的网络优化

# 开启多线程下载

# 验证优化后的网络测速

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ReMcKzoTHxw

【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1

【零度博客】▶https://www.freedidi.com

-------------------------------------

🔔

免费、高速的DNS服务器：https://www.freedidi.com/12941.html

游戏玩家的优化代码：https://www.freedidi.com/12947.html

开启浏览器多线程下载：https://www.freedidi.com/2099.html

🐙🥇⛱️🌈

0:00 视频简介

0:13 优化前的网络测速

0:46 设置网络控制

1:35 优选免费高速的DNS

4:09 WiFi传输电源值设置

4:52 漫游主动性

5:04 首选网络频带

5:39 禁用 U-APSD 自动省电模式

6:04 更改保留宽带的占用

7:02 修改tcp吞吐量级别

8:28 游戏玩家的网络优化

9:31 开启多线程下载

10:39 验证优化后的网络测速

=======================

其它更多精彩内容推荐：😍

https://youtu.be/4YIz_P25iTI

item.description:
# 优化前的网络测速

# 设置网络控制

# 优选免费高速的DNS

# WiFi传输电源值设置

# 漫游主动性

# 首选网络频带

# 禁用 U-APSD 自动省电模式

# 更改保留宽带的占用

# 修改tcp吞吐量级别

# 游戏玩家的网络优化

# 开启多线程下载

# 验证优化后的网络测速

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ReMcKzoTHxw

【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1

【零度博客】▶https://www.freedidi.com

【加入会员】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w/join

-------------------------------------

🔔

免费、高速的DNS服务器：https://www.freedidi.com/12941.html

游戏玩家的优化代码：https://www.freedidi.com/12947.html

开启浏览器多线程下载：https://www.freedidi.com/2099.html

🐙🥇⛱️🌈

零度高级会员：https://vip.freedidi.com

🔰 安全VPN推荐（最高优惠链接）：

1.ExpressVPN：https://go.expressvpn.com/c/2612933/1645830/16063

2.PureVPN： https://billing.purevpn.com/aff.php?aff=44074

🚀VPS 推荐：

1.https://bittly.cc/Vultr （优惠链接）

2.https://bandwagonhost.com/aff.php?aff=58794 （CN2 GIA 全网高速线路）

🦞

AI 生成对口型视频（支持多语言）：https://bittly.cc/rHFM3

🐳我的下载工具：https://bittly.cc/idm

💓

1.回国加速VPN ：https://bittly.cc/qt8cx

💰比特币交易平台

1.火币官网 : https://www.htx-kol.com/invite/zh-cn/1g?invite_code=48tr7

接码平台推荐:

https://sms-activate.org/?ref=4203005

0:00 视频简介

0:13 优化前的网络测速

0:46 设置网络控制

1:35 优选免费高速的DNS

4:09 WiFi传输电源值设置

4:52 漫游主动性

5:04 首选网络频带

5:39 禁用 U-APSD 自动省电模式

6:04 更改保留宽带的占用

7:02 修改tcp吞吐量级别

8:28 游戏玩家的网络优化

9:31 开启多线程下载

10:39 验证优化后的网络测速

=======================

其它更多精彩内容推荐：😍

https://youtu.be/h5rUawU0R04

https://youtu.be/kuWCMrKk9m4

https://youtu.be/4FWDFhTB6Yk

https://youtu.be/2G-Emzf29BU

https://youtu.be/UDGdZaoz77A

https://youtu.be/N3CTgtz3GMc

https://youtu.be/nSDz2W7SbOk

https://youtu.be/4YIz_P25iTI

https://youtu.be/DO8HZ6_pWqI

https://youtu.be/PgLDCgEIX40

https://youtu.be/vX51savENcs

https://youtu.be/ecfrVMlsvO4

https://youtu.be/3kWqECtHg1E

https://youtu.be/absq9kTV_NM

https://youtu.be/5ymZYqEWlOA

https://youtu.be/L_d5WRlzDYE

https://youtu.be/eKCvwvhGo5I

https://youtu.be/EX7SrTaCqQo

# 优化前的网络测速

# 设置网络控制

# 优选免费高速的DNS

# WiFi传输电源值设置

# 漫游主动性

# 首选网络频带

# 禁用 U-APSD 自动省电模式

# 更改保留宽带的占用

# 修改tcp吞吐量级别

# 游戏玩家的网络优化

# 开启多线程下载

# 验证优化后的网络测速

====
